issue_title: Bug: Provider gets logged out when accessing telemedicine page
issue_body:
## Bug
Navigating to /provider/telemedicine and then back to dashboard logs the user out. The telemedicine page triggers an API call that returns 401, causing the httpClient to call handleUnauthorized() and clear the session.

## Impact
Providers cannot use the telemedicine feature without being logged out.

## Suspected Cause
One of the API calls made by the telemedicine page returns 401 for a provider_staff user. This could be a backend route that requires a different role, or the request is being made without the auth token.
